summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Low-signal PR closeout, merge, fix, and raise-pr actions are disabled by the job frontmatter. Open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer or author follow-up; already closed PRs are not given close actions; the one security-sensitive PR is quarantined with route_security.

actions.reason: Independent docs PR with active review/follow-up context; not safe or allowed to close as low-signal in this job.
Useful standalone CLI fix candidate, but review and stale-base follow-up remain; no close or merge action is permitted.
Small independent docs PR awaiting maintainer review/update; no duplicate, superseded, or low-signal close basis is available.
Substantial standalone quality-probe addition requiring maintainer review; not a closure candidate in this inventory shard.
Independent test/guard PR, but proof and stale-base follow-up block merge; no safe close classification is supported.
Independent Slack reliability candidate with unresolved proof requirement; not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal-close eligible.
Independent bot-authored prompt/style PR with unresolved review and proof blockers; no close action is allowed or justified.
Already closed historical contributor PR; retain as closed context only.
Already closed historical PR; keep the linked issue path separate and do not emit any close action for this closed PR.
Exact security-sensitive ref identified by preflight; route only this item to central OpenClaw security handling.
